creator: pavelivolkov@googlemail.com
text:
Hi.
None.

emulators/dynamips - it's the latest release 0.2.7, published May 26,
2007. (http://www.ipflow.utc.fr/index.php/Cisco_7200_Simulator)

emulators/dynamips-devel - this latest development release 0.2.8-RC2,
the author published October 14, 2007. Until recently the most used
version. (http://www.ipflow.utc.fr/blog/)

emulators/dynamips-community - this is an unofficial version
0.2.8-RC3, of the community GNS-3, published April 11, 2011.
(http://www.gns3.net/content/dynamips-028-rc3-community-version-released)

dynamips can be used either by itself or together with the text or the
graphical frontends. emulators/dynagen, emulators/dynagui,
emulators/gns3 - may require revision after the introduction of the
new version. Probably a good idea to keep only the newest version,
after some time. Will follow its development.
Thanks.


On Fri, Apr 22, 2011 at 11:42,  <dhn@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: [NEW PORT] emulators/dynamips-community: Cisco 1700/2600/3600/3=
700/7200 Simulator

nd
